name: Coffee Gallery
tagline: North Shore roastery with Oahu, Maui, and Kona beans — the real locals' coffee stop in Haleiwa.
parking: Parking in the North Shore Marketplace lot — easy
talkStory: A Haleiwa fixture since the early 2000s, Coffee Gallery roasts beans from multiple Hawaiian estates in-house: Waialua (grown right here on the North Shore), Kona, Maui, and Kauai. The Waialua estate coffee is the insider move — you’re drinking coffee grown 10 miles away on former Dole plantation land. Grab a bag of Waialua beans as a souvenir most visitors don’t know exists — Oahu-grown coffee is genuinely rare.
